query:
SELECT target_folder, status, COUNT(*) AS n
FROM drive_push_queue
WHERE created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 14 DAY)
GROUP BY target_folder, status
ORDER BY n DESC
LIMIT 80;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ZHgHA7566FjgCYD.51c539e8d5ba --database mm3swGictQLHDWKPJCGiHp --execute SELECT target_folder, status, COUNT(*) AS n
